title: Can High Catastrophe Losses Hurt Allstate's (ALL) Q3 Earnings?
text: Allstate's (ALL) Q3 results are likely to suffer Hurricane Ian-induced catastrophe losses and inflationary pressures, partly offset by growing premiums within its Property-Liability segment.

title: Allstate Selects Voya Investment Management for Portfolio Mandate
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Voya Investment Management, the asset management business of Voya Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VOYA), announced today that it was selected by Allstate (NYSE: ALL) to manage the firm's $850 million commercial mortgage portfolio effective Nov. 14, 2022.

title: Dividend Stocks That Do More Than Just Boost Their Payout
text: The "Dividend Knights" screen looks at market-beating companies that have paid a dividend for 10 consecutive years and have grown the dividend by more than 10% annually.

title: Why Allstate Shares Crashed Today
text: The insurance company is trapped between a poorly performing stock market and its rising costs of payouts.

title: Allstate warns of surprise loss, even as auto insurance rates jumped 16% in some locations last month
text: Shares of Allstate Corp. ALL, -11.41% tumbled Thursday, enough to pace the S&P 500 index's losers by a wide margin, after the insurer warned of a surprise third-quarter loss, amid weakness in its personal auto business.

title: Allstate Announces Estimated Third Quarter 2022 Results
Why Allstate Stock Rose 3.3% in September
text: The insurer raised rates significantly in some regions to offset inflationary increases and higher losses.

title: Allstate to Discuss Third Quarter 2022 Earnings With Investors
text: NORTHBROOK, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) will conduct a conference call and webcast at 9 a.m. Eastern on Thursday, Nov. 3, 2022, to discuss third quarter 2022 earnings. The company plans to file a current report on Form 8-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission announcing quarterly results at or after 4:15 p.m. Eastern on Wednesday, Nov. 2. To view Allstate's quarterly results after their filing, including the earnings release and investor supplement, visit
